events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce exactly one valid JSON object matching schema. Need assess field condition. Scenario: Overcurrent device selection & coordination. Field condition compared with drawing/manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, layout callouts line up with installed work, revision block current. Reference NEC 240 etc. Stage tested/inspected. Component conditions none flagged. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since evidence says matches docs and revision current, likely pass. Need include fields. Need consider NEC 240 overcurrent protection, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings relevant to selection? The scenario doesn't mention any issue, so pass. risk low. component_conditions empty. percent_complete maybe 100 if tested/inspected? Stage tested/inspected. value irrelevant default 0. findings empty. actions empty. rationale. references list. Ensure raw JSON no markdown.
